description: Implement a small code or documentation change with Codex GPT-5.6 SOL high effort, or revise the change using high and middle review feedback.

input.description: Provide the small code or documentation change request. Preferred fields are targetDirectory, requestedChange, constraints, acceptanceCriteria, and verificationHint.

output.description: Return JSON with changed files, implementation summary, verification commands, and addressed review feedback.
